occupation_title: Education and Childcare Administrators, Preschool and Daycare
occupation_definition: Plan, direct, or coordinate academic or nonacademic activities of preschools or childcare centers and programs, including before- and after-school care. Excludes “Preschool Teachers, Except Special Education” (25-2011) and “Childcare Workers” (39-9011).

breadcrumb.occupation_title: Education and Childcare Administrators, Preschool and Daycare
